implementationGate.requiredTestTitle: Regression: BUG-001 options flow shell is ready before heavy hydration begins
implementationGate.requiredPreFixResult: RED: first native option delta request observes no ready shell

scenarios.title: Shell precedes heavy option hydration

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression: BUG-001 options flow shell is ready before heavy hydration begins
plannedRegressions.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression: BUG-001 options flow shell is ready before heavy hydration begins" --reporter=list
plannedRegressions.classification: e2e-ui real local page and same-origin static server with native request observation only
plannedRegressions.requestObservationMode: page.addInitScript wraps native fetch and forwards each request unchanged
plannedRegressions.discriminator: A native-fetch observer records whether the ready shell exists at the first data/options request. Current production reports false; the repair must report true without delaying, fulfilling, aborting, or rewriting the request.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: SCN-012-028 and SCN-012-029 all 23 registry pages bootstrap one exact shell without script-order drift
plannedRegressions.discriminator: All 23 success records must exist under the unchanged 10-second selector contract; options-flow cannot be skipped or granted a larger timeout.

expectedAssertions: cache-first state rebuild and render remain immediate
shared shell is ready before the first option delta request
the existing ten-second selector contract remains unchanged
delta hydration starts once after shell readiness

scenarios.title: Context and option ownership remain intact
expectedAssertions: same-origin option snapshots and existing fallback order remain unchanged
RLTKR and RLCTX controls remain enabled after hydration
no protected source or data path changes

scenarios.title: Every registered route still mounts one shell
expectedAssertions: all twenty-three route records are present
each route exposes one ready shell and four expected panels
no route is skipped or handled by a shared tool-ID branch
mobile and broader Research Lab regressions remain green
